allow: Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(json.dumps\(d['overview']\)\); print\('runs:', len\(d['runs']\), 'pipelines:', len\(d['pipelines']\), 'approvals:', len\(d['approvals']\)\)")
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('success', d['success'], 'count', len\(d['data']\)\)")

Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('success', d['success'], 'count', len\(d['data']\)\); print\('first run keys:', sorted\(d['data'][0].keys\(\)\)\); print\('first stage keys:', sorted\(d['data'][0]['stages'][0].keys\(\)\)\)")
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('id', d['id'], 'name', d['name']\)")
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('status', d.get\('statusCode'\), 'msg short:', \(d.get\('message'\) or ''\)[:80]\)")

Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('success', d['success']\); r=d['data']; print\('pipelineRunId', r['pipelineRunId'], 'status', r['status'], 'triggerMode', r['triggerMode'], 'stages', len\(r['stages']\)\)")
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('id', d['id'], 'status', d['status'], 'stages', len\(d['stages']\)\)")
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); r=d['data']; print\('pipelineRunId', r['pipelineRunId'], 'status', r['status'], 'sources', r['sources'][0]\)")
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('status', d['status']\); [print\(' ', s['name'], s['status']\) for s in d['stages']]")
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('runs', len\(d['runs']\), 'pipelines', len\(d['pipelines']\), 'approvals', len\(d['approvals']\)\)")
